description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OctoBot-Tentacles-CI that runs on every push to any branch and tag, and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: tests, upload_tentacles, and notify. The tests job runs on a matrix of macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-latest with x64 architecture, and Python 3.8 with sources and cython types. It checks out the code, installs OctoBot, and runs tests with Pytest. The upload_tentacles job uploads tentacles to Nexus and requires the tests job to succeed. The notify job sends a failure notification to Discord if any of the previous jobs fail.
